title: sabulina pusilla
intro: Sabulina pusilla, also known as dwarf saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is native to the Arctic regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its astringent and antimicrobial properties. Sabulina pusilla is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to promote wound healing, soothe digestive issues, and boost the immune system.
